content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Handled the bv --robot-next message-only success response (e.g. {"message":"No actionable items available"}) that previously fell through to BvFailed, leaving stale hint files untouched. Added a NoRecommendation variant to HintCaptureOutcome that represents a successful bv run with no actionable recommendation. In capture_next_step_hint, when exec_json fails to parse as NextBeadResponse, the raw output is checked for a message-only JSON structure via BvMessageOnlyResponse; if matched, NoRecommendation is returned instead of BvFailed. In reconcile_success, the NoRecommendation arm calls a new delete_stale_hint function that removes the existing next_step_hint.json file, preventing downstream selection from acting on a pointer to an already-completed bead. Added two regression tests: capture_hint_no_recommendation_on_message_only_response (unit test verifying the parse path) and reconcile_success_clears_stale_hint_on_no_recommendation (e2e test that pre-persists a stale hint, runs reconcile_success with message-only bv, and asserts the hint file is deleted).

## Steps

1. [Completed] Added NoRecommendation variant to HintCaptureOutcome enum (success_reconciliation.rs:353-356) representing a successful bv run with no actionable recommendation, documented with when stale hints should be removed
2. [Completed] Added BvMessageOnlyResponse struct (success_reconciliation.rs:370-374) with a single message: String field for deserializing bv's message-only JSON responses like {"message":"No actionable items available"}
3. [Completed] Updated capture_next_step_hint (success_reconciliation.rs:376-405) to detect message-only responses on parse failure: when exec_json fails, checks e.raw_output() and tries to deserialize as BvMessageOnlyResponse; if successful returns NoRecommendation, otherwise falls through to BvFailed with tracing::debug log
4. [Completed] Added NoRecommendation arm to the match in reconcile_success (success_reconciliation.rs:177-184): calls delete_stale_hint to remove any previously persisted hint, returns None for next_step_hint
5. [Completed] Added delete_stale_hint function (success_reconciliation.rs:457-475): resolves milestone_id, constructs hint_path, removes the file if it exists with tracing::debug on failure. Best-effort, never blocks reconciliation
6. [Completed] Added unit test capture_hint_no_recommendation_on_message_only_response: mocks bv returning {"message":"No actionable items available"} as successful stdout, asserts capture_next_step_hint returns HintCaptureOutcome::NoRecommendation
7. [Completed] Added e2e test reconcile_success_clears_stale_hint_on_no_recommendation: creates milestone with plan, starts bead, pre-persists a stale hint file, runs reconcile_success with message-only bv mock, asserts outcome.next_step_hint is None and stale hint file is deleted from disk
8. [Completed] Fixed cargo fmt issue in delete_stale_hint (line wrapping). Ran cargo test --lib success_reconciliation (13 passed), cargo test full suite (all passed), cargo clippy (0 new warnings), cargo fmt --check (clean)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test --lib success_reconciliation: 13 passed (8 original unit + 1 original e2e + 1 sync_failure_on_replay + 1 terminal_with_different_detail + 2 new: capture_hint_no_recommendation_on_message_only_response, reconcile_success_clears_stale_hint_on_no_recommendation), 0 failed
- cargo test full suite: all tests passed, 0 failed
- cargo fmt --check: no formatting issues
- cargo clippy: 0 new warnings in success_reconciliation.rs; 16 pre-existing warnings in unrelated files
- Amendment verified: capture_next_step_hint at success_reconciliation.rs:391-397 checks e.raw_output() for BvMessageOnlyResponse; returns NoRecommendation when matched
- Unit test verified: capture_hint_no_recommendation_on_message_only_response passes message-only JSON through MockBvRunner, asserts HintCaptureOutcome::NoRecommendation
- E2e test verified: reconcile_success_clears_stale_hint_on_no_recommendation pre-persists stale hint, runs with message-only bv, asserts hint file deleted and outcome.next_step_hint is None
- Existing tests unaffected: all 11 prior tests continue to pass including e2e with hint persistence (bead-next hint) and terminal replay tolerance
- git diff --stat: success_reconciliation.rs 1 file changed — NoRecommendation variant, BvMessageOnlyResponse struct, updated capture_next_step_hint, delete_stale_hint function, 2 regression tests

## Outstanding Risks

- The lineage task_id extraction still parses the 'task_id=<value>' format from outcome_detail via the extract_task_id_from_outcome_detail helper. This couples the fs adapter to a format defined in success_reconciliation.rs. A future refactor should thread task_id as a first-class parameter through the record_bead_completion/update_task_run chain to eliminate this format dependency.
- The BvMessageOnlyResponse check uses serde_json::from_str which accepts any JSON object with a 'message' field. If bv returns a different JSON shape that happens to have a 'message' field but is not an explicit 'no recommendation' signal, it will be treated as NoRecommendation. This is acceptable because: (1) NextBeadResponse parsing is attempted first, so valid recommendations always take priority, (2) any JSON with a message field but missing id/title is definitionally not a valid recommendation, and (3) the fallback to BvFailed only occurs for non-JSON or truly unparseable output.
- The delete_stale_hint function uses std::fs::remove_file which is not atomic — a concurrent reader could see the file disappear mid-read. This is acceptable because hint reads are advisory and best-effort; a partial read simply means no hint is available for that cycle.
